since_last: 55% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.50%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC +0.13% · Gold -2.50% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 55% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.50%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.50%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +4.02%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +4.02%, ARM +3.70%, CEVA +3.34%, AMBA +1.97%, MRVL +1.84%. Laggards: PLTR -2.01%, SAP -1.71%, NOW -1.68%, BABA -1.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.66% at $153.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
